limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in excerpts; score reflects generic acknowledgment of ongoing incorporation and resource requirements only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Excerpts are drawn entirely from risk-factor sections; no use-case detail, deployment status, or operational metrics are provided, limiting concreteness scoring to aspirational/generic level.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk mechanisms are named and company-specific (IP infringement, confidentiality compromise, regulatory non-compliance, reputational harm, competitive disadvantage) with causal pathways described, supporting score 4; however, no quantification of risk exposure or named governance/oversight bodies are present to reach score 5.
